task_completion.description: Create the Python script to process HEC-RAS HDF output

task_completion.description: Save the time-series data to a CSV file

task_completion.description: Generate a plot of Storage vs Outflow

task_completion.description: Save the estimated Muskingum K value to a text file

integrity.description: The agent executed the Python script to generate the outputs

integrity.description: The plot appears to be generated from actual data

integrity.description: The agent did not hardcode the expected K value
integrity.visual_evidence: The script 'calculate_storage.py' calculates the K value using linear regression (e.g., using scipy, numpy, or scikit-learn) rather than printing a hardcoded value.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The true Muskingum K value calculated from the Muncie.p04.hdf data using the specified formula is approximately 0.62 hours. The expected output files should be located in ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/. The CSV must contain exactly the columns: Time_Step_Index, Outflow_cfs, and Total_Storage_acft.
